query:
SELECT customerName, accountBalance, paymentAmount, courseAmount, createdAt 
FROM orders 
WHERE customerName LIKE '%清%' 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;

SELECT id, name, accountBalance 
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%清%';
